# Parametrika — Bespoke Parametric Furniture

Parametrika is Dubai's only bespoke parametric furniture studio. We design and manufacture custom furniture using CNC-precision milling and handcrafted assembly. Every piece is made to order for one client — private villas, five-star hotels and signature spaces across the UAE and GCC.

## Collections

- Parametric Dining Tables (ZAHA, ZAHIR, VILAR): https://parametrika.ae/en/catalog/tables
- Coffee and Side Tables (RAFAN, DUNE, RAYAN): https://parametrika.ae/en/catalog/tables
- SAHARA Rocking Chair: https://parametrika.ae/en/catalog/chairs
- Office Tables (ZAHA-OFFICE, VILAR-OFFICE): https://parametrika.ae/en/catalog/tables
- Console Tables: https://parametrika.ae/en/catalog/consoles
- Parametric Wood Wall Panels: https://parametrika.ae/en/catalog/wood-panels

## About

Founded in Dubai, UAE. Office 101, Al Zarouni Business Centre, Al Barsha. Production atelier in Tashkent with Turkish master craftsmen. White-glove delivery and installation across UAE and GCC.

## Materials

Multi-layer engineered solid wood, CNC-milled to precision. Internal metal reinforcement. 4-stage lacquer finish using premium BETEK lacquer. Suitable for indoor and outdoor use.

## Parent Company
